deck_ready_evaluation.comprehension: Users can understand the product direction quickly because the app is non-chat-generic and Home makes flagship flows visible.
deck_ready_evaluation.first_session_delight: The strongest first wow lands through Episode Experience, Artifact, and Next Act reinforcement.
deck_ready_evaluation.freshness: The MVP is fresh enough for current submission and demo use, with deeper variation as a future opportunity.
deck_ready_evaluation.continuity: Home, Next Act, Archive, and profile familiarity together provide lightweight but credible continuity proof.
deck_ready_evaluation.demo_stability: The prototype is presentation-safe if known-good flows and disciplined demo narration are used.
